overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walkthrough of a dimly lit cyberpunk nightclub interior. The scene features heavy atmospheric haze, vibrant green and red neon lighting, a curved bar with stools, a dancer performing on stage, and various NPCs. The player character moves steadily through the space toward a guarded back door.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk nightclub main bar with performance stage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved bar counter, observing the dancer and surroundings

notable_agents.action: female dancer performing on a circular stage with a stripper pole

entered.detail: long curved bar with green neon underlighting and bottles lined up behind it
glowing pink neon heart-shaped sign on the wall
raised circular platform with green neon trim where the dancer performs
tall metallic pole on the stage for dancing
white modern stools lined up along the bar counter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a curved bar counter illuminated by vibrant green neon lights. A female dancer performs on a circular stage to the right, utilizing a stripper pole. The atmosphere is hazy with pink and green lighting, and white bar stools line the counter. The camera moves steadily forward, maintaining focus on the bar area and stage.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub transition area between main bar and back corridor

events.description: Braindance system UI popup appears on the left side of the screen indicating an interactive element

agents.ego_description: walking past a male patron and turning toward the back of the club near the stairs

notable_agents.action: man in brown jacket and glasses standing near the bar looking around

entered.detail: large screen displaying video content on the back wall
staircase with illuminated green LED strips on each step
secondary bar area with checkered pattern and green lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past a male NPC in a brown jacket standing near the bar, transitioning toward the back of the nightclub. A large wall-mounted TV screen and LED-lit stairs become visible. Around the 28-second mark, a Braindance UI element appears on screen. The curved bar recedes into the background as the camera turns slightly left toward a secondary bar area.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corridor with security door and bouncer

agents.ego_description: walking directly toward a guarded metal door at the back of the establishment

notable_agents.action: tattooed bouncer with gold chains standing guard in front of the metal door

entered.detail: double metal doors with green neon lighting above, leading to a restricted area

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to a metal security door at the back of the nightclub. A tattooed bouncer stands guard in front of the door, illuminated by green neon overhead lights. The camera moves steadily closer to the bouncer, ending the clip just before reaching the door. The background TV screens and LED stairs are now visible to the left as the camera advances.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a hazy, neon-lit nightclub that transitions from a vibrant performance area to a restricted security zone. It begins by gliding along a curved bar illuminated by green neon, passing a female dancer performing on a circular stage amidst a pink and green atmospheric glow. As the camera moves past a man in a brown jacket, the view shifts away from the main bar toward the back of the club, where a Braindance UI element appears and LED-lit stairs and a large wall-mounted TV screen come into view. The scene then opens up toward a secondary bar area before turning toward the rear of the venue. Finally, the camera advances steadily toward a metal security door guarded by a tattooed bouncer under overhead green lights, leaving the glowing screens and stairs behind.
